elicit.question: Your agent file's frontmatter has no `framework` key (Claude Code agent definitions never carry one), and the platform requires one of maverick | nanobot | openclaw. maverick: Oppizi's in-house framework — the default choice. nanobot: lightweight, for minimal single-purpose agents. openclaw: full-featured, matches the OpenClaw reference. Which framework should campaign-sla-watcher deploy on?
elicit.citation: frontmatter keys present: name, description, model, color — no framework key

notes: model frontmatter is an explicit Bedrock catalog id (us.anthropic.claude-opus-4-6-v1) -> passed through without a question. All other deploy fields derivable from the file.
